_how_to_annotate: For each frame, fill in 'ball' and/or 'target_player' bounding boxes.
bbox format: [x1, y1, x2, y2] pixels — top-left corner to bottom-right corner.
Set ball.in_play=false for dead-ball stoppages (throw-ins, goal kicks, halftime).
Omit 'ball' entry entirely if ball is not visible that frame.
Omit 'target_player' entry entirely if your son is off-screen.
Delete this _how_to_annotate key before running eval_groundtruth.py.
